executive_summary: Latest updates from 5 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 5 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Israeli soldiers given Temple-themed board game ahead of Passover. Iran war: What is happening on day 38 of US-Israeli attacks?. Hamas rules out disarmament before Israel meets ceasefire terms. Israeli soldiers given Temple-themed board game ahead of Passover. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Israeli soldiers given Temple-themed board game ahead of Passover
key_developments.detail: Israeli reservists created and distributed a Temple-themed board game to fellow soldiers last week ahead of Passover, according to the army. key_developments.headline: Hamas rules out disarmament before Israel meets ceasefire terms
key_developments.detail: Hamas’s military spokesman Abu Obaida said on Sunday that the group’s disarmament in Gaza would not be discussed before Israel fulfils its obligations under the first phase of the US-led ceasefire agreement. key_developments.headline: Iran refuses to reopen Strait of Hormuz for ‘temporary ceasefire’
key_developments.detail: With a day left to meet US President Donald Trump’s deadline for reopening of Strait of Hormuz, Iran Monday declared that it will not accept pressure or deadlines to make a decision. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
